title: Glenniea pervillei
taxonomy: Glenniea pervillei is a species of plant in the family Burseraceae. It belongs to the genus Glenniea, which comprises several species of trees native to Australia. The classification of Glenniea pervillei is further supported by its classification as a flowering plant, specifically a dicotyledon. Glenniea pervillei is a member of the order Sapindales and the subclass Rosidae. The precise classification of Glenniea pervillei is a result of ongoing research in botanical taxonomy.
uses: Glenniea pervillei has been used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world, particularly in Africa and Asia, for its potential health benefits.
